name: prioritize_requirements
description: Applies a deterministic prioritization algorithm to a set of requirements. Supports three methods: MoSCoW (must/should/could/wont categorisation), WSJF (Weighted Shortest Job First — score = (business_value + time_criticality + risk_reduction) / job_size), and Weighted scoring (custom criteria with weights). The agent supplies requirements with pre-scored fields; this skill runs the math and returns a sorted priority table with a markdown report.

requirements.description: List of requirements. Each item must have id, title, description. For moscow: add category ('must'|'should'|'could'|'wont'). For wsjf: add user_business_value, time_criticality, risk_reduction, job_size (all 1-10). For weighted: add a score per criterion name matching keys in criteria.

criteria.description: Only for method='weighted'. Keys are criterion names, values are numeric weights. Each requirement must have a matching numeric field per criterion.
